description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, typical of modern urban neighborhoods. The structure features multiple rooms, as indicated by the visible internal walls and doorways, and several window openings distributed across its facades. The exterior is simple and unadorned, with clean lines and a uniform surface finish, suggesting a contemporary architectural style. There is a prominent entryway extending from the main structure, likely serving as the front entrance. The roof appears to be flat and may be suitable for limited use as a terrace or for placing equipment. The overall design is functional, prioritizing efficient use of space and straightforward access to all rooms.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, clean lines, and multiple window openings, designed for efficient urban living. The structure is rectangular with a prominent entryway and a simple, functional exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway and several window openings on the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structure and the arrangement of rooms and windows along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with additional windows and a clear view of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation and the extension of the entryway.
